metadata.title: Evidence-bounded public transcriptomics prioritises stromal-myeloid composition for validation in gastric cancer peritoneal contexts
metadata.description: Scripts, derived metadata anchors, audit reports, figure source exports and supplementary tables supporting a public-data prioritisation study of gastric cancer peritoneal contexts. Raw public datasets are not redistributed. Code and scripts are licensed under MIT; non-code derived materials are licensed under CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise stated.
